_comment: Authoritative SHARED bracket for the league. Every device loads this over its local copy when this file is newer (updatedAt). Empty (updatedAt null) = no shared state yet; each device uses its own until a commit lands.
_commissioner_workflow: To publish your bracket to the whole league: (1) on the Bracket tab tap 'Export for the league' — it copies a full JSON snapshot to your clipboard; (2) open THIS file in an editor; (3) REPLACE the entire file contents with the copied JSON (paste over everything, do not merge); (4) save, commit, and push. Only one person (the commissioner) should commit this; pull before committing to avoid clobbering. The newest updatedAt always wins.
